description: Weekly rotating premium dessert menu announcements with visual emphasis on new seasonal flavors, limited-time offerings, and indulgent presentation designed to drive urgency and cravings.
structural_recipe: Lead with seasonal or limited-time dessert hero (e.g., 'NEW' flag). Use emoji-heavy captions (🍪🎡🧇🍓) to signal celebration and abundance. Structure as weekly menu rotation with date ranges (e.g., 'Apr 13–18'). Include flavor descriptors (cake batter, fudgy, buttercream) with sensory detail. Deploy festive framing for holiday windows (year-end, Valentine's). Use caps for emphasis ('WEEKLY ROTATING MENU') and call-to-action language ('Don't miss', 'Let's get'). High emoji density and visual breaks with emoji separators.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to scarcity signals and exclusivity (limited-time, weekly rotation). Festive, celebratory language aligns with occasion-driven purchasing and social sharing culture. Premium dessert positioning appeals to gifting and indulgence occasions common in Saudi social calendars. Detailed sensory descriptions and new product emphasis trigger cravings and FOMO-driven engagement.
transplantation_caveats: Alcohol references (if any) must be removed or localized; check ingredient transparency for halal compliance
Friday/weekend timing may perform better than weekday posts in Saudi market
Ramadan and Eid windows may require different messaging and fasting-aware positioning
cultural_constraints: Ensure all ingredients are halal-certified or clearly labeled
Avoid pork products or derivatives in any dessert description
Consider gender dynamics in imagery (if featuring people, align with local social norms)
